title: Dr. Kildare's Victory
writer: Harry Ruskin, Willis Goldbeck, Joseph Harrington
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Ann Ayars
plot: Dr. Jimmy Kildare is back at work at Blair General hospital, though several people admit that he is not himself since suffering his loss. He's taken a liking to a young intern, Don Winthrop, and tries to help him out when he trans...
